---
title: ""
---

::: {#home .hero}

<video id="hero-video" class="hero-video" autoplay muted loop playsinline
       poster="favicon.svg" preload="metadata"
       aria-hidden="true"></video>

::: {.hero-overlay}
:::

::: {.hero-content}
::: {.hero-badge .fade-in-up .delay-1}
Based in Argentina - building data products that run
:::

# Progress <span class="accent">in</span> Motion {.hero-title .fade-in-up .delay-2}

::: {.hero-actions .fade-in-up .delay-3}
[See my work](#work){.btn .btn-primary .glow-btn}
[Let's talk](#contact){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
:::
:::

:::

::: {#about}

::: {.about-intro}

::: {.glass-panel .profile-card .float-bob .fade-in}

::: {.profile-img-container}
::: {.profile-initials}
MW
:::
:::

## Maximo Williner {.profile-name}

::: {.title-badge}
Data Analyst - BI - ETL
:::

::: {.card-stats}
::: {.stat}
[3+]{.stat-val}
[Years Exp.]{.stat-label}
:::
::: {.stat}
[20+]{.stat-val}
[Dashboards]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.specialties}
[Python]{.badge} [Tableau]{.badge} [SQL]{.badge} [Power BI]{.badge}
:::

:::

::: {.glass-panel .text-card .fade-up}
I turn messy data into decisions - automated pipelines, elegant BI dashboards, and forecasts that hold up in production. Built for real budgets and real teams.

Most of my work sits where analytics meets engineering: dbt models, Airflow dags, BI tooling, and the SQL glue in between. I've worked remote across timezones and I keep documentation honest.
:::

:::

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
about me
:::

## Who I Am {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.about-grid}

::: {.glass-panel .stats-card .fade-in}
::: {.stat-grid}

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>
:::

[Python + SQL]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[Core stack]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg>
:::

[Tableau / Power BI]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[BI delivery]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"/><polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"/><path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"/></svg>
:::

[Airflow + dbt]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[ETL automation]{.stat-label}
:::

:::
:::

:::

## What I Work With {.section-title .fade-up}

::: {.skills-container}

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Languages

::: {.skill-chips}
[Python]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [PostgreSQL]{.chip} [BigQuery]{.chip} [Snowflake]{.chip} [R]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Visualization / BI

::: {.skill-chips}
[Tableau]{.chip} [Power BI]{.chip} [Looker]{.chip} [Metabase]{.chip} [Plotly]{.chip} [Seaborn]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Infrastructure / ETL

::: {.skill-chips}
[Airflow]{.chip} [dbt]{.chip} [Spark]{.chip} [DuckDB]{.chip} [Docker]{.chip} [GCP]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Methods

::: {.skill-chips}
[Cohort analysis]{.chip} [Forecasting]{.chip} [A/B testing]{.chip} [Attribution]{.chip} [Data modeling]{.chip}
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {#work}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
selected work
:::

## Projects {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.projects-grid .fade-in}

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v1}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
::: {.project-emoji}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg>
:::
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Sales Pulse {.accent}

Interactive BI dashboard tracking revenue, churn, and cohort retention across regions.

::: {.tech-stack}
[Python]{.chip} [Tableau]{.chip} [PostgreSQL]{.chip} [dbt]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v2}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
::: {.project-emoji}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="22 7 13.5 15.5 8.5 10.5 2 17"/><polyline points="16 7 22 7 22 13"/></svg>
:::
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Pricing Intelligence {.accent}

Web-scraping pipeline comparing competitor prices with ML-driven repricing suggestions.

::: {.tech-stack}
[Python]{.chip} [scikit-learn]{.chip} [BigQuery]{.chip} [Looker]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v3}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
::: {.project-emoji}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.5 4.27 9 5.15"/><path d="M21 8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16Z"/><path d="M3.3 7 12 12l8.7-5"/><path d="M12 22V12"/></svg>
:::
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Inventory Forecast {.accent}

Time-series forecasting (Prophet + ARIMA) for warehouse stock levels, cut overstock 23%.

::: {.tech-stack}
[Python]{.chip} [Prophet]{.chip} [Power BI]{.chip} [Snowflake]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

:::

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
live demo
:::

## Embedded BI {.section-title .fade-up}
:::

The Power BI dashboard below is embedded directly in this Quarto page using raw HTML.

<iframe class="embed fade-in"
  src="https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=YOUR_EMBED_TOKEN"
  title="Inventory Forecast - Power BI"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen="true">
</iframe>

> Replace the `src` URL with your published Tableau or Power BI embed link.

:::

::: {#experience}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
track record
:::

## Experience {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.case-studies-list .fade-in}

::: {.case-study-card .glass-panel}
::: {.cs-meta}
[Full-time]{.cs-tag} [Reporting]{.cs-tag}
:::

::: {.cs-content}
### Data Analyst - [Acme Corp](https://example.com) {.accent}

Jan 2023 - Present

Designed executive KPI dashboards in Tableau for 30+ stakeholders. Automated reporting pipelines with Python + Airflow, cutting manual work ~15 hrs/week. Partnered with product on A/B analysis and retention modeling.

::: {.cs-outcomes}
::: {.cs-stat}
[30+]{.cs-stat-val}
[stakeholders]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[15h]{.cs-stat-val}
[saved weekly]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[3]{.cs-stat-val}
[cohorts modeled]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.cs-stack}
[Tableau]{.chip} [Python]{.chip} [Airflow]{.chip} [dbt]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.case-study-card .glass-panel}
::: {.cs-meta}
[Full-time]{.cs-tag} [Marketing]{.cs-tag}
:::

::: {.cs-content}
### Junior Data Analyst - Beta Analytics {.accent}

2021 - 2022

Built ETL jobs in SQL (BigQuery) for marketing spend attribution. Created Looker dashboards tracking CAC, LTV, and payback period. Documented data models in dbt for the analytics engineering team.

::: {.cs-outcomes}
::: {.cs-stat}
[CAC]{.cs-stat-val}
[attribution]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[LTV]{.cs-stat-val}
[modeled]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[dbt]{.cs-stat-val}
[documented]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.cs-stack}
[BigQuery]{.chip} [Looker]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [dbt]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## Education & Certifications {.section-title .fade-up}

::: {.cert-grid .fade-in}

::: {.cert-card .glass-panel}
::: {.cert-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 10 12 5 2 10l10 5 10-5Z"/><path d="M6 12v5c0 1 2.5 2 6 2s6-1 6-2v-5"/></svg>
:::

### B.Sc. in Statistics

University Name, 2017-2021
:::

::: {.cert-card .glass-panel}
::: {.cert-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="6"/><path d="M15.477 12.89 17 22l-5-3-5 3 1.523-9.11"/></svg>
:::

### Google Data Analytics Certificate

2022
:::

::: {.cert-card .glass-panel}
::: {.cert-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
:::

### Tableau Desktop Specialist

2023
:::

:::

:::

::: {#contact .site-footer}

::: {.footer-top .glass-panel .fade-in}

::: {.contact-info}

## Got a project? {.gradient-text}

<br>
Let's talk.

Open to full-time Data Analyst / BI Engineer roles and freelance dashboard projects. Based in Argentina, working globally.

:::

::: {.btn-row}
[Email me](mailto:maximowilliner35@gmail.com){.btn .btn-primary .glow-btn}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maximo-williner-12155a292/){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
[GitHub](https://github.com/maxiwilliner){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
:::

:::

::: {.footer-bottom}
[Maximo Williner]{.brand}
[Built with Quarto - (c) 2026]{.copyright}
:::

:::
